Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grandmasters]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — The Grandmasters are meeting today.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Grandmasters have discussed Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Grandmasters are planning to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Grandmasters believe Damasca is killing the world and driving people with tyranny.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmasters prize secrecy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The Grandmasters discussed alliance details with the Overlord and his Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The Grandmasters have dwindling numbers and cannot fight a long war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Alin believes the Grandmasters are part of the problem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — The Grandmasters reached the Tree in Cana.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Grandmasters assign inner and outer guards.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
